<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>Educoder</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.staticfile.org/jquery/1.10.2/jquery.min.js"></script>
  <script src="step2/verify.js"></script>
</head>
<style type="text/css">
  body {
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .container {
    min-width: 1200px;
  }

  .flex {
    display: flex;
  }

  header {
    background: #24292D;
    height: 60px;
    justify-content: space-between;
    /* Logo距离屏幕左侧25px */
    padding: 0 25px;
  }

  header > div {
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
  }

  /*********** Begin ************/
  /* Logo：宽40 高38，和文字列表间距30px */
  .logo {
    width: 40px;
    height: 38px;
    margin-right: 30px;
  }

  /* 导航父容器：弹性布局，子项间距30px */
  .nav-list {
    display: flex;
    gap: 30px;
  }

  /* 单个文字容器：固定宽64px，文字样式 */
  .nav-item {
    width: 64px;
    color: white;
    font-size: 16px;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
  }

  /* HOT角标定位 */
  .hot {
    position: absolute;
    top: -6px;
    right: 0;
  }
  /*********** End ************/
</style>
<body>
<div class="container">
  <header class="flex">
    <div class="left-wrap">
      <!--********** Begin **********-->
      <!-- Logo图片 -->
      <img class="logo" src="https://data.educoder.net/images/educoder/headNavLogo.png?1526520218">
      <!-- 6个导航项，顺序严格匹配效果图 -->
      <div class="nav-list">
        <div class="nav-item">实践课程</div>
        <div class="nav-item">翻转课堂</div>
        <div class="nav-item">实训项目</div>
        <div class="nav-item">
          在线竞赛
          <img class="hot" src="data:image/png;base64,">
        </div>
        <div class="nav-item">教学案例</div>
        <div class="nav-item">交流问答</div>
      </div>
      <!--********** End **********-->
    </div>
    <div class="right-wrap">

    </div>
  </header>
</div>
</body>
</html>
